title: Keeleco Grey Baby Zebra Ring Rattle
features: Keel Eco is an environmentally friendly plush line as they are entirely produced with 100% recycled plastic. They are part of a collection that concerns endangered animals. Children will be happy to play with super soft and tender animals.
description: Keel Eco is an environmentally friendly plush line as it is made entirely from 100% recycled plastic. They are part of an endangered animal collection. Kids will be happy to play with super soft and cuddly animals.
